page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core topology. The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong performance across multiple vectors. The CPU delivers top 25% results in both single-core and multi-core stress-ng evaluations, as well as in Passmark CPU tests, including extended instructions, physics, and encryption. Memory performance is particularly notable, with the Passmark memory score ranking in the top tier (top 10%) and cached small-block read bandwidth reaching the top 25%. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and Redis SET operations also place in the top 25%, demonstrating efficient parallel processing capabilities.

From a resource density perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory performance offer solid qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring consistent compute power without hyperthreading overhead. The lack of local storage requires external storage provisioning, which is a key architectural tradeoff. This instance is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, database operations, static web serving, and general-purpose enterprise workloads that benefit from a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and strong cryptographic and vector instruction support.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.12xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance configured with 48 dedicated physical cores (48 vCPUs) powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 192.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Network performance is supported by a 16 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Benchmark data highlights strong performance in the top 25% for both single-core and multi-core CPU operations, alongside a top-tier (top 10%) Passmark memory score. The instance excels in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, Redis SET operations, and database tasks. Lacking local storage, it relies on network-attached storage. This configuration is optimized for enterprise applications, database operations, and static web serving requiring dedicated compute resources and high memory bandwidth.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.12xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 48 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 192 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering top-tier memory and strong multi-core performance.

tagline: A dedicated 48-core AMD EPYC platform with balanced memory density and top-tier memory bandwidth for demanding enterprise workloads.

192 GB of RAM providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio
Top-tier memory performance ranking in the top 10% of benchmarks
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong multi-core CPU, database, and Redis SET performance
Best suited for database operations, web serving, and parallel processing
